name: shinobix-api
description: ShinobiX game API — Express/cPanel backend, Supabase storage

scripts.build: npm run build:server && npm run build:client && npm run verify:dist
scripts.test: node --import tsx --test server-routes.test.ts api/missions/_pool.test.ts api/missions/_mission-catalog.test.ts api/pvp/_vanguard-rewards.test.ts api/pvp/_reward-farm.test.ts api/pvp/_aoe.test.ts api/pvp/_sanitize.test.ts api/pvp/_lifesteal.test.ts api/pvp/_tags.test.ts api/pvp/_combat-tags.test.ts api/pvp/_applyjutsu-characterization.test.ts api/pvp/_weapon-damage.test.ts api/_text-moderation.test.ts api/_utils.test.ts api/_ratelimit.test.ts api/_lock.test.ts api/_receipts.test.ts api/_audit.test.ts api/_asset-registry.test.ts api/_ranked-rating.test.ts api/_ranked-match-token.test.ts api/_auth.test.ts api/_treasury-donate.test.ts api/_clan-save-validate.test.ts api/_village-state-validate.test.ts api/_territory-supply.test.ts api/_map-control-reward.test.ts api/_xp-engine.test.ts api/_bank-interest.test.ts api/_storage.test.ts api/messages.test.ts api/_combat-formula-parity.test.ts api/images.test.ts api/img.test.ts
